title: File
description: Represents a report file generated by running a report.

id.description: The unique ID of this report file.

reportId.description: The ID of the report this file was generated from.

status.description: The status of this report file.

format.description: The output format of this report file.

lastModifiedTime.description: The timestamp in milliseconds since epoch for when this file was last modified.

urls.description: The URLs where the completed report file can be downloaded.
